## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Candy Lee to explore potential collaboration opportunities and discuss Marcel's new venture.](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, fwd.digital, recently raised $12M Series A and is scaling rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation and marketing services, with a focus on delivering outcomes rather than just tools](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Candy Lee is currently doing consulting/advising work for early-stage startups after leaving her CMO role at Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Both discussed potential collaboration opportunities, including advisory roles and leveraging Candy's CMO network](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's New Venture: fwd.digital

  - [Recently raised $12M Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Crossed $1M ARR last week](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [61 deals currently in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Focuses on AI-powered content creation and marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Developed a system for describing and executing knowledge work in code](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aims to deliver outcomes rather than just tools or expensive agency work](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### AI-Powered Workflow System

  - [Creates auto-documented, code-based workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Combines AI agents, LLMs, API calls, and expert collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Allows for massive scaling and parallel processing of tasks](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Example: Research workflow that develops questions, searches sources, and creates briefs](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### Candy Lee's Current Status

  - [Left CMO role at Home Base after Series B raise](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Took 4-5 months off to recover from burnout](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Now doing consulting/advising work for early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Co-chair of the Marketing Academy alumni organization (network of \~1000 CMOs)](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Candy to have a deeper dive with Kyle (from fwd.digital) to better understand the product](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Explore advisory roles or referral arrangements](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Candy's CMO network for business development](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Discuss creating an "accelerator path" for smaller companies](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Consider co-developing work streams or practices for non-tech industries](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Candy to catch up with Kyle for a more detailed product overview](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Marcel and Candy to regroup in 2-3 weeks for a longer discussion (about 1 hour)](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Explore specific collaboration opportunities after Marcel's due diligence process is complete](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Consider ways to create win-win situations through referrals or co-development of services](https://fathom.video/share/N4QCvyGA3fZ77mVEBycw4Jx584b8zysC?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
